news.t: WisdomTree U.S. MidCap Dividend Fund Ranked Top Smart Beta ETF
Yieldy ETFs gain on a tepid day for stocks
Add Up The Parts: The Invesco S&P Ultra Dividend Revenue ETF Could Be Worth $42
Analysts Anticipate The Invesco S&P Ultra Dividend Revenue ETF Will Reach $42
Analysts Anticipate The Invesco S&P Ultra Dividend Revenue ETF To Hit $43

holdings.infoBox: RDIV is an equity ETF with a total of 63 individual holdings. The top holdings are HP Inc. stock at 5.66%, Ford Motor Company at 5.49%, Prudential Financial at 5.32%, U.S. Bancorp at 4.90%, and Target at 4.84%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P Ultra Dividend Revenue ETF (RDIV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 900 Dividend Revenue-Weighted index. The fund selects the 60-highest-yielding stocks from the S&P 900 and weights them by revenue. RDIV was launched on Oct 1, 2013 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: WisdomTree U.S. MidCap Dividend Fund Ranked Top Smart Beta ETF
data.text: The WisdomTree U.S. MidCap Dividend Fund is the only US Dividend Smart Beta ETF rated as “Best” this week. Q.ai has also recognized 5 as “Good” and 4 as “Caution.
